nodes.name: HomeGlowField.swift
nodes.summary: Full-page atmospheric background for the Home dashboard that crossfades from drifting glow blobs (morphProgress 0) to a deep-space galaxy with stars and blooms (morphProgress 1) as the user scrolls.
nodes.languageNotes: Body is split into glowBlobLayer and galaxyLayer ViewBuilders so each type-checks in isolation (the inline two-layer ZStack with per-blob sin offsets compiled at 163ms).

nodes.name: HomeGlowField
nodes.summary: SwiftUI View that opacity-crossfades a seven-blob glow atmosphere against a galaxy layer driven by morphProgress, orchestrating staggered fade-in and looping drift animations on appear.

nodes.name: LightAuraBloom.swift
nodes.summary: Light-mode analogue of FlameAura: Canvas-drawn layered warm blobs (rose, peach, gold, lavender) that rise and breathe above a selected pill on cream backgrounds, scaled by the pill's intensity.

nodes.name: LightAuraBloom
nodes.summary: SwiftUI View rendering the intensity-scaled warm bloom; returns EmptyView for the .dim intensity and animates the blobs via a 60fps phase timer on a Canvas.

nodes.name: LightModeShimmer.swift
nodes.summary: Light-mode foil shimmer matching HolographicShimmer's energy on cream surfaces using two offset diagonal gradient sweeps in a warm purple/magenta/gold palette with screen blending.

nodes.name: LightModeShimmer
nodes.summary: SwiftUI View animating a primary horizontal sweep plus an optional offset secondary diagonal pass (pills only) so the two never sync, faking foil depth without strobing.

nodes.name: MazePatternView.swift
nodes.summary: Concentric engraved maze-ring pattern (rings with gaps plus radial spokes) rendered in multiple stroke layers for a debossed look, with a co-centered TileOrbitView comet orbit at its core.

nodes.name: MazePatternView
nodes.summary: SwiftUI View building the gapped-ring and spoke maze Path in four offset stroke layers (glow, groove shadow, main line, highlight) and embedding a TileOrbitView sharing its GeometryReader coordinate space.

nodes.name: OrbitSpark.metal
nodes.summary: Metal fragment shader that draws a single comet-like spark orbiting a rounded-rectangle border, using a signed-distance border mask and a time-driven angular sweep with mode-switchable dark/light spectrum colors.

nodes.name: orbitSpark
nodes.summary: Stitchable color shader computing a rounded-rect SDF border mask and a spark whose angular position orbits over time, tinted along a cyan/purple/magenta (or warm aurora) ramp with a hot white core.

nodes.name: OrbitSparkBorderView.swift
nodes.summary: SwiftUI wrapper that strokes a rounded-rectangle border with the spectrum gradient and applies the orbitSpark Metal colorEffect, animating the spark via TimelineView elapsed time and passing a palette mode for dark/light.

nodes.name: OrbitSparkBorderView
nodes.summary: View that drives the orbitSpark shader with size, elapsed time, border width, corner radius, and a color-mode float selecting the dark or warm palette.

nodes.name: PillBorder.swift
nodes.summary: View-extension modifiers (.pillBorder / .magentaGoldBorder) that add a crisp spectrum or warm gradient stroke plus a blurred outward glow duplicate to selected/active pill surfaces.
nodes.languageNotes: Public View extension delegates to a shared private PillBorderModifier so both the dark spectrum and light warm variants reuse one stroke-plus-glow implementation.

nodes.name: SectionHeader.swift
nodes.summary: Trivial all-caps muted section label used above sections in Settings, Home, and list screens.

nodes.name: SparkField.swift
nodes.summary: Campfire-ember particle system for light-mode onboarding screens: per-screen tuned configurations drive a Canvas of rising, drifting, life-cycled warm sparks composited below content.
nodes.languageNotes: Each SparkField owns an isolated @StateObject SparkSystem (no singleton); plusLighter blending is applied only inside the Canvas while .compositingGroup() seals the layer so sparks sit beneath ZStack siblings.

nodes.name: SparkConfiguration
nodes.summary: Value-type configuration capturing all per-screen spark tuning (count, speed, radius, glow, opacity ceilings, spawn and fade zones, palette), with one static preset per onboarding screen and a shared warm-ember default palette.

nodes.name: SparkField
nodes.summary: SwiftUI View driving its owned SparkSystem on a 30fps TimelineView Canvas, compositing-grouped and hit-testing-disabled so it always sits in the background.

nodes.name: SparkSystem
nodes.summary: ObservableObject owning the isolated particle array: configures, updates, and draws all particles with plusLighter blending inside the Canvas context.

nodes.name: Particle
nodes.summary: Value-type ember spark storing normalized position, velocity, drift, lifecycle frames, and color; computes a combined lifecycle-plus-spatial opacity curve and draws a three-layer halo/dot/core, respawning when aged out.

nodes.name: SpectrumHairline.swift
nodes.summary: Shared spectrum hairline accents: a flat fading cyan-purple-magenta line and a tapered lens/spindle variant (thickest at center, sharp points at the ends) used as on-brand sheet edge accents.

nodes.name: SpectrumHairline
nodes.summary: View rendering a thin full-width spectrum gradient line that fades to clear at both ends, the app's hairline accent shared by on-brand sheets.

nodes.name: TaperedSpectrumHairline
nodes.summary: View filling a lens-shaped tapered hairline with the spectrum gradient, mirroring VaylBorderEffect's tapered hairline at section scale for the OB sheet top-edge accent.

nodes.name: TileOrbitView.swift
nodes.summary: Purpose-built comet-orbit animation for small tile contexts (44-88pt): resting static arcs or TimelineView-driven comet orbits whose phase offsets and color cycling keep heads and hues from ever colliding.
nodes.languageNotes: Canvas-only with no state objects or trail history; resting state mounts no TimelineView so it costs zero GPU, and color cycling lerps the whole orbit as a unit through cyan/magenta/purple anchors.

nodes.name: TileOrbitView
nodes.summary: SwiftUI View switching between a resting-arc Canvas and an active comet Canvas; the active draw renders dim rings, a segmented gradient tail, a radial head glow, and a white-hot dot per orbit.

nodes.name: VaylBorderEffect.swift
nodes.summary: The animated spectrum pill border for VaylButton: a tapered hairline at rest that fills with a two-sided crisp-plus-halo spectrum stroke on press, with an outward-only glow achieved via destinationOut masking.
nodes.languageNotes: Stroke width is linearly interpolated across resting/active/glowing states to avoid a single-frame snap; the halo is masked inward (positive inset) so only the outward blur survives, and hairline visibility is decoupled from progress to close a one-frame gap.

nodes.name: VaylBorderEffect
nodes.summary: SwiftUI View composing the hairline, resting boundary stroke, masked outward halo, and two trimmed crisp spectrum strokes whose width, blur, and opacity are driven by progress and glowIntensity.

nodes.name: VaylButton.swift
nodes.summary: The app's primary CTA button: a holographic-shimmer pill with the animated VaylBorderEffect, choreographing press-down haptics, border fill, and a precisely scheduled post-fill glow burst on release.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses CACurrentMediaTime (monotonic) rather than Date() to schedule the glow so NTP drift cannot mis-fire it; a custom DragGesture with ±20pt slop replaces a tap to get accurate inside/cancel detection at the 44pt hit target.

nodes.name: VaylButton
nodes.summary: SwiftUI View stacking the capsule fill, HolographicShimmer, VaylBorderEffect, and label, with gesture handlers that drive press state, haptics, border progress, and the async glow task.

nodes.name: onPressUp
nodes.summary: Release handler that fires medium haptic, computes remaining border-fill time from the monotonic press timestamp, then runs an async task sequencing glow-in, hold, and glow-out before invoking the action.

nodes.name: VaylFlourishView.swift
nodes.summary: Signature decorative flourish: two gradient-stroked paths that orbit and meet at a single center node, encoding duality and connection, breathing gently via an ambient pulse animation.

nodes.name: VaylFlourishView
nodes.summary: Canvas-based SwiftUI View drawing the mirrored flourish arms, curls, tails, and secondary waves with per-stroke linear gradients plus a small center node, scaled by an ambient breathing animation.

nodes.name: InteractiveField.swift
nodes.summary: Reusable icon-plus-TextField input row with a color-scheme-adaptive background, subtle border, and a soft accent shadow in dark mode.

nodes.name: ToggleRow.swift
nodes.summary: Trivial icon-plus-label-plus-Toggle row used in Settings sections, bound to an external isOn state.
